notifications.title: Government Portal session verified
notifications.body: PIN verification completed. SAMANVAI can now assist within this authenticated session.

history.input: I want to check eligibility for Income Certificate
history.response:
Sure. I'll help you with your Income Certificate application.

Certifies annual family income for educational and welfare purposes.

I need one required detail to continue: What is your primary source of income?

I can help with Income Certificate, Caste or Community Certificate, Food Security Card, PM-KISAN, PMFBY, PMAY-U 2.0, Indiramma Illu, Aarogyasri, Post-Matric Scholarship, Kalyana Lakshmi, PMEGP, Sukanya Samriddhi, and Aasara Disability Pension. Tell me your need in your own words, and I will collect only the required details.

I can help with Income Certificate, Caste or Community Certificate, Food Security Card, PM-KISAN, PMFBY, PMAY-U 2.0, Indiramma Illu, Aarogyasri, Post-Matric Scholarship, Kalyana Lakshmi, PMEGP, Sukanya Samriddhi, and Aasara Disability Pension. Tell me your need in your own words, and I will collect only the required details.

Sure. I'll help you with your Food Security Card / Ration Card application.

Subsidized food grains under PDS and core BPL identification.

I need one required detail to continue: What is your total annual family income?
